dataset: FOIA VistA with Synthetic Patient Data (VEHU)

pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly starts yottadb with %ydbgui and opens Firefox pointing to its URL.
Confirmed via task.json description, setup_task.sh checks (which iterate over ^SRF), and verifier.py prompt checking for the ^SRF global.
Confirmed via task.json instructions 'Expand at least 3 different case entries' and verifier.py prompt looking for expanded IEN entries.
Confirmed via verifier.py which defines this exact dictionary structure as the fallback scoring_weights default.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the worldvista/vehu Docker image which provides a FOIA VistA environment containing synthetic patient data (VEHU dataset). The target interface is YDBGui running on port 8089. The correct VistA database global for surgical case records is ^SRF. The user is required to expand at least 3 different surgical cases to view operative details. Note: The verifier.py script provided with the task is severely truncated and contains a syntax error at the end, meaning programmatic verification will always fail in its current state.
